title: derenbergia biloba
intro: Derenbergia biloba, also known as Ginkgo biloba, is a unique plant species that is considered a living fossil, with its existence dating back over 270 million years. The medicinal properties of Ginkgo biloba are attributed to its leaf extracts, which have been used to improve blood circulation, memory, and cognitive function. The health benefits of Ginkgo biloba include reducing the risk of dementia, improving symptoms of depression, and preventing age-related macular degeneration. Herbal preparations of Ginkgo biloba are available in the form of capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
